record.field:
# ========================================================= # CONFIGURATION: Change this to match your printer's name printer_search_term = 'WH3_OFFICE2' # =========================================================
# 1. Check if Direct Print is installed if 'printnode.scenario' not in env: raise UserError("The Direct Print (printnode) app is not installed.")
# 2. Find the Report report_ref = 'tug_mrp_mods.action_report_mrp_package_zpl' report = env.ref(report_ref, raise_if_not_found=False) if not report: raise UserError(f"Report {report_ref} not found. Please upgrade the module first.")
# 3. Find the Printer # Search for a printer matching the name printer = env['printnode.printer'].search([('name', 'ilike', printer_search_term)], limit=1)
# If not found, try to grab the first available printer as a fallback if not printer: printer = env['printnode.printer'].search([], limit=1)
if not printer: raise UserError("No printers found in Odoo. Please add a printer in Direct Print app first.")
# 4. Create the Scenario mrp_model = env['ir.model']._get('mrp.production')
# Check if it already exists to avoid duplicates existing = env['printnode.scenario'].search([ ('model_id', '=', mrp_model.id), ('report_id', '=', report.id), ('printer_id', '=', printer.id), ('domain', '=', "[('state', '=', 'done')]") ])
if not existing: env['printnode.scenario'].create({ 'name': f"Auto ZPL on MO Done ({printer.name})", 'model_id': mrp_model.id, 'report_id': report.id, 'printer_id': printer.id, 'action_type': 'print_report', 'domain': "[('state', '=', 'done')]", 'active': True, }) action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'display_notification', 'params': { 'title': 'Success', 'message': f"Scenario created successfully for printer: {printer.name}", 'type': 'success', 'sticky': False, } } else: action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'display_notification', 'params': { 'title': 'Info', 'message': "This scenario already exists.", 'type': 'warning', 'sticky': False, } }
